title: Surface incoming LICHEN messages and status to MeshCore app clients
description: Why this exists: a connected MeshCore client must see incoming LICHEN messages/status events if the adapter claims messaging support. What needs to be done: add or reuse an adapter-facing event API for incoming LICHEN local messages/status updates, translate those events into MeshCore app-visible notifications/responses, queue them over the local transport, and handle disconnected clients. Acceptance criteria: tests inject LICHEN message/status events and verify encoded MeshCore client-visible output; queue limits/drop policy are deterministic; disconnected clients do not corrupt adapter state; behavior is documented for smoke tests.
notes:
Input from project-LICHEN-9c4y.2 contract: incoming LICHEN messages/status should be surfaced through a shared app-interface event boundary and then queued by the MeshCore adapter for MSG_WAITING/SYNC_NEXT_MESSAGE. project-LICHEN-gbx6 tracks the shared boundary; this Bead should avoid directly coupling MeshCore to gateway-local Meshtastic fanout.
Implementation evidence 2026-07-01: added MeshCore incoming app-event APIs and pending queue in lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore; added MSG_WAITING, CHANNEL_MSG_RECV_V3 text, PUSH_SEND_CONFIRMED status, and SYNC_NEXT_MESSAGE pending drain behavior; gateway app-interface sink now forwards text/status events into MeshCore adapter and resets pending state on BLE session epoch changes to prevent cross-session delivery. Tests added for text/status delivery, validation, queue full, waiting-push backpressure, disconnected clients, disconnect race, reconnect-before-sync stale pending drop, and gateway app-interface queue-full path. EC2 validation on i-05e27e074db786e22 using /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-9c4y4: direct native_sim lichen/tests/meshcore_adapter PASS 14/14; direct native_sim lichen/tests/meshcore_gateway_adapter PASS 9/9; Twister command 'python3 /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/zephyr/scripts/twister -T lichen/tests/meshcore_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshcore_gateway_adapter -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-meshcore-events --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/Users/markatwood/Desktop/Projects/project-LICHEN/lichen' PASS 2/2 scenarios, 23 cases, 0 Twister warnings; MeshCore gateway native_sim build PASS with existing CONFIG_BT_FIXED_PASSKEY and empty-library CMake warnings. Review evidence: Faraday re-review no P0/P1/P2, session-retention P2 resolved; Archimedes re-review no P0/P1/P2, prior P1/P2 resolved; Poincare independent review no P0/P1/P2, residual vector and physical BLE smoke gaps filed as project-LICHEN-9c4y.8.1 and project-LICHEN-9c4y.8.2 respectively. git diff --check PASS.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware scope: MeshCore incoming text/status app-interface events are encoded, queued, delivered through MSG_WAITING/SYNC_NEXT_MESSAGE, protected against BLE session epoch leaks, covered by native_sim and Twister, and reviewed clean. Residual vector and hardware BLE smoke gaps filed as project-LICHEN-9c4y.8.1 and project-LICHEN-9c4y.8.2.
